Long Neck Run

Guide your character through an endless obstacle course, collecting colored rings to grow your neck! Match your character's color to collect rings safely - correct colors add +1 to your neck length, wrong colors cost you -2. Navigate through challenging obstacles like zip lines and pools that require minimum neck lengths to pass. Survive as long as possible while collecting gems to unlock new character skins. The longer your neck, the more gems you earn!

Controls: Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move character horizontally | Space: Change character color | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Return to start screen

test_2_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: Character survives significantly longer than random play, successfully passes multiple obstacles, achieves high neck length (30+), and collects substantial gems. Demonstrates mastery of all game mechanics.
